session.os_version: Darwin Kernel Version 25.5.0: Mon Apr 27 20:38:56 PDT 2026; root:xnu-12377.121.6~2/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000
session.model_label: Llama 3.2 (1B) — Meta, general language, very small

log.prompt: Describe the feeling of standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night, in two or three sentences.
log.response: The air is heavy with the scent of salt and seaweed as you stand at the edge of the void, the darkness beyond seeming to press in on you from all sides like an endless, churning sea. The stars above twinkle like cold, distant eyes, while the waves below crash and foam against the shore, a rhythmic beat that seems to echo the pulsing of your heart. It's as if the very fabric of time has been torn apart, revealing a vast, dark universe that stretches out before you like an endless, starry abyss.
